title: Enhancer hubs govern chromatin topology and Th17 identity
abstract: Systematic measurement of regulatory potential of candidate elements across five mouse CD4+ subsets. ATAC-STARR-seq found ~25% of open chromatin regions demonstrate regulatory activity. CRISPR epigenome editing screens identified core elements essential for Th17 polarization. Region Capture Micro-C resolved precise 3D chromatin topologies. Discovered active regulatory hubs formed through CTCF-independent interactions in hierarchical architecture. A critical Batf enhancer operates chromatin contacts.
